trades.sentiment_summary: Indivior reported strong Q4 2025 results with sales of $358 million and net income of $102 million, reaffirming its 2026 revenue outlook of $1.13-1.20 billion and announcing a $400 million share buyback program over 18 months[3]. Analysts maintain a Strong Buy consensus with price targets around $35-45, citing growth in Sublocade patients and prescribers[4][5]. Recent technical indicators show positive short-term trends and rising volume[2].

Analysts maintain a 'Moderate Buy' consensus on Coeur Mining (CDE) with an average price target of $20.88, supported by five buy ratings, two strong buys, and despite one recent downgrade.[2] Zacks highlights CDE's strong financials, including doubled cash reserves, robust earnings growth projections of 406% for 2025, and a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy), recommending investors buy the stock.[1] The stock recently popped 5.7% following positive year-end mineral reserves updates.[3]

Analysts maintain a strong Buy consensus on Dutch Bros (BROS) stock with a 2026 price target of $77.58, citing improved same-store sales estimates at 3.8%, rising EBITDA, and growth potential from unit expansion and morning daypart sales[2]. Options trading highlights interest in March 2026 contracts, including attractive put premiums at $42.50 strike and covered calls at $55.00 offering up to 29.89% return[1]. Recent reports emphasize real customer demand driving 4.7% systemwide transaction growth[4].

ADMA Biologics announced a major $200 million capital return plan for 2026, including a $125 million accelerated share repurchase (ASR) agreement with JPMorgan Chase, as part of a broader $500 million repurchase program that has already deployed $160 million since May 2025.[1][5] The company was recently upgraded to a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy) due to upward earnings estimate revisions, with analysts maintaining unanimous buy ratings and a target price of $25.67, suggesting 59.52% upside potential.[2][3]
